perturbation.original_text: Contribution by Sponsor: In consideration for the right to sponsor the Kaya Fest and to be acknowledged by Fruit of Life Productions LLC., as a Promoter of the event during the term of this Agreement, Sponsor agrees to contract with Fruit of Life Productions LLC., for the amount of $250,000.00 to be paid in full upon signing of this agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: Contribution by Sponsor: In consideration for the right to sponsor the Kaya Fest and to be acknowledged by Fruit of Life Productions LLC., as a Promoter of the event during the term of this Agreement, Sponsor agrees to contract with Fruit of Life Productions LLC., for an amount to be determined no later than April 30, 2018. The amount will be determined by market conditions and mutual agreement.
perturbation.explanation: The original agreement mandates a fixed payment of $250,000.00 upon signing. The modified version introduces ambiguity by stating the amount will be determined later based on unspecified market conditions. This directly contradicts the initial fixed amount. The contradiction takes place in the second line and it contradicts the first sentence.
perturbation.contradicted_text: SPONSORSHIP AGREEMENT This agreement (the "Agreement") is made effective this 1st day of April, 2018 ("Effective Date") between Fruit of Life Productions LLC, ("Promoter") and Eco Science Solutions, Inc.,("Sponsor"), 1135 Makawao Avenue, Suite 103-188, Makawao, Hawaii, 96768. Contribution by Sponsor: In consideration for the right to sponsor the Kaya Fest and to be acknowledged by Fruit of Life Productions LLC., as a Promoter of the event during the term of this Agreement, Sponsor agrees to contract with Fruit of Life Productions LLC., for an amount to be determined no later than April 30, 2018. The amount will be determined by market conditions and mutual agreement. Bank Wire Transformation Information See Attached Wire Instructions Sponsorship Benefits for Presenting Partner Sponsor: * Main Stage named after your brand * 4 10x10 on site vendor booths * 50 VIP Sponsor Passes / 50 GA tickets for both days * 4 Parking passes * Opportunity to participate in after party * Banner placement in venue (10) * Approved audio/video assets to be provided as promotional use for Herbo * Name and phrase called out on stage between performers set * Your logo and a link from our website to your website * Your logo on video wall * Your company name and logo as a presenting sponsor * Banner at main entrance of venue * On stage banner placement * Logo in Backstage/VIP area * Mention on social media * Logo on Step and Repeat * Logo on all promotional print Terms and Termination: The term of this agreement will begin on April 1, 2018 and continue until April 30, 2018 at 11:59pm.
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies a fixed payment of $250,000.00 upon signing. The changed text replaces this with an amount to be determined later based on market conditions and mutual agreement. This directly contradicts the original fixed amount specified in the same section, leading to a clear and significant conflict within the document. The contradiction is strong because it replaces a fixed obligation with an undetermined one, creating uncertainty and potential unenforceability.

perturbation.original_text: Entire Agreement: This Agreement and its attachments constitute the entire agreement between the parties and supersede all prior agreements, oral or written, relating to the Sponsorship. This Agreement may only be admitted in a writing signed by both parties.
perturbation.changed_text: Entire Agreement: This Agreement and its attachments constitute the entire agreement between the parties and supersede all prior agreements, oral or written, relating to the Sponsorship. This Agreement may be modified by oral agreement between the parties, provided such modification is documented in writing within 30 days.
perturbation.explanation: The original agreement states that it can only be modified in writing signed by both parties. The changed text introduces the possibility of oral modifications. The statement "may only be admitted in a writing signed by both parties" is directly contradicted by "may be modified by oral agreement". This creates confusion about how the agreement can be legally changed.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Entire Agreement: This Agreement and its attachments constitute the entire agreement between the parties and supersede all prior agreements, oral or written, relating to the Sponsorship. This Agreement may be modified by oral agreement between the parties, provided such modification is documented in writing within 30 days. The agreement is confidential, and the parties agree not to file or record in public records. Notice: All notices given under this Agreement shall be in writing, addressed to the parties at the addresses set forth below, and shall be deemed to have the duly given when delivered when sent by overnight courier, or certified mail (return receipt requested). Fruit of Life Productions LLC (Promoter) Address: 16115 SW 117t h Ave. Suite 21-A Miami, Florida 33177 EcoScience Solutions, Inc. (Sponsor) Address: 1135 Makawao Avenue, Suite 103-188 Makawao, Hawaii 96768 The Sponsor agrees that upon acceptance, this agreement shall be deemed to form and binding contract between the Sponsor and Promoter.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces the possibility of modifying the agreement through oral agreements under certain conditions. The original agreement specifies that modifications can only be made in writing signed by both parties. This contradicts the original agreement and creates uncertainty about the correct procedure for amending the contract, causing a strong in-text contradiction.
